meta.title: Payment Gateway Control - Admin
meta.description: Manage provider state, routing, and safe runtime payment controls with typed validation and rollback.

page.title: Payment Gateway Control
page.description: Read-only tables show provider state and change history. Create and edit actions open dedicated modals so the screen stays clean.

summary.activeProvidersHint: Enabled and not in maintenance mode
summary.healthyProvidersHint: Validation health from the runtime overlay

providers.title: Providers
providers.description: Configure Paymob and Stripe from dedicated modals.

routing.title: Routing
routing.description: Global provider order, default provider, and fallback are controlled separately from provider settings.

history.title: Change history
history.description: All provider and routing changes are logged with before and after snapshots.

providers.stripeDescription: Stripe controls remain limited to safe runtime availability and routing flags.
providers.noSnapshotsDescription: Provider runtime snapshots will appear here once the gateway control module loads.
providers.methodSummary: {count, plural, one {# active method} other {# active methods}} | {flow}
providers.methodRegistryDescription: Only methods verified on the merchant account should remain enabled.

providerModal.title: {provider} configuration
providerModal.description: Edit the provider runtime state in a dedicated modal. Secrets remain env-managed and are not editable here.
providerModal.methodRegistryDescription: Only methods verified on the merchant account should remain enabled.
providerModal.superAdminNote: SUPER_ADMIN only. Secrets remain env-managed and cannot be edited here.

routingModal.title: Routing configuration
routingModal.description: Adjust the default provider and fallback order from a dedicated modal.
routingModal.superAdminNote: SUPER_ADMIN only. Routing is validated before activation.

rollbackModal.title: Rollback change
rollbackModal.description: Restore a previous known-good snapshot after step-up confirmation.
rollbackModal.rollbackReasonPlaceholder: Why should this revision be restored?
rollbackModal.note: Rollbacks are audited and require SUPER_ADMIN confirmation.

common.noHistoryDescription: The latest provider or routing changes will appear here after the first save.
common.noProviderSnapshotsDescription: Provider runtime snapshots will appear here once the gateway control module loads.
